title: Proteins Annotation of Nano-DESI MSI Datasets
author: yang1832
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bm2rk8d6

steps.instruction: Create mass list from the averaged spectrum.
Calculate the charge state of each multiply charged peaks based on the spacing between the isotopic peaks.
Calculate the exact mass based on the m/z and charge state.
Obtain CID data from each sample.
Assign peaks by matching the exact mass and the CID spectrum to the protein databank. http://prospector.ucsf.edu/prospector/cgi-bin/msform.cgi?form=msproduct
